title: DA8 2AD, European Metal Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/FB3509MJ/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: European Metal Recycling Limited Installation name: European Metal Recycling Permit number: EPR/FB3509MJ/V004  "
